sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79371" key="pare/mfusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρέμ-φῠσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n79371.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">point of attachment</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:9:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.9.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
